providers.name: bitnet-local
providers.system_prompt: Answer concisely and show your reasoning steps.

tasks.prompt: Describe a three-step procedure for safely starting a local CPU-only BitNet experiment branch before a training run. Mention git status, a dedicated branch, and log capture.
A CPU-only BitNet run failed after an experiment commit. Explain how to preserve history while undoing the failed change. Mention revert commit, local-only constraints, and checking the run log.
Give a three-step plan to improve the reliability and capability of a local research agent over successive 5-minute CPU-native BitNet runs.
